offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed renewal dates cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of subscription payments.
problem: Etsy sellers miss renewal dates for essential tools, leading to service interruptions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try Monthly renewal alerts and Dashboard for tracking subscriptions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
